items.name: Montgomery Gator Tail
items.description:
The ultimate rockstar finish! 🎸✨ Complete your animatronic look with Monty’s official heavy-duty gator tail.

⚠️ PLEASE READ: This is a standalone accessory designed to pair with the Montgomery Gator Body Edition bundle. To get the full Pizzaplex look, make sure to grab the Body, Head, and Shoulder Pads separately!

Ready to rock and roll?
